summary: Iteration 11 - All new features tested successfully. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new pages (Leaderboard, Trade) and updated SignalsPage with plan usage badge verified working correctly.

backend: GET /api/user/plan returns plan info with limits and features fields
GET /api/user/plan-usage returns correct limits and usage for logged-in user
GET /api/community/stats returns total_traders, total_signals_generated, total_trades_logged, community_win_rate
GET /api/community/leaderboard returns array (empty since no closed trades with 3+ entries)
GET /api/community/my-stats returns badges, rank, win_rate, total_pnl, total_trades
GET /api/trade/account returns balance ($100,000), nav, margin info from OANDA
GET /api/trade/history returns user's trade execution history
GET /api/sitemap.xml returns valid XML sitemap with all pages
GET /api/signals/strategies returns 10 strategies (auto, smc, ema_crossover, etc.)
GET /api/market/live returns crypto, forex, indian data with market_status
frontend: Sidebar: Trade nav link (ArrowUpRight icon) visible
Sidebar: Leaderboard nav link (Trophy icon) visible
Leaderboard page: data-testid='leaderboard-page' loads correctly
Leaderboard page: Community stats cards (Total Traders: 28, Signals Generated: 62, Trades Logged: 0, Community Win Rate: 0%)
Leaderboard page: Your Stats section visible with Rank, Win Rate, Total P&L, Trades
Leaderboard page: Top Traders section visible (empty state with message)
Trade page: data-testid='trade-page' loads correctly
Trade page: Trade Execution title and OANDA subtitle visible
Trade page: Account summary cards (Balance: $100,000, Unrealized P&L: +$0.00, NAV: $100,000, Open Trades: 0)
Trade page: Place Order form with instrument select (EUR/USD default)
Trade page: Order type select (Market/Limit/Stop)
Trade page: Units input, Stop Loss, Take Profit fields
Trade page: BUY and SELL buttons visible
Trade page: Open Positions section visible
Trade page: Recent Executions section showing previous trade (EUR_USD SELL 10 units)
Signals page: Plan usage badge shows 'Titan Plan' and 'Unlimited signals today'
Signals page: Signal generator card with Market/Asset/Strategy selectors
Signals page: Timeframe toggles (1m, 5m, 15m, 1H, 4H, 1D, 1W)
Signals page: Generate Multi-TF Signal button visible
Signals page: Existing signals displayed with confidence ring, direction badges, risk badges

plan_based_feature_gating.GET /api/user/plan: Returns plan_name, status, billing_cycle, expires_at, limits, features
plan_based_feature_gating.GET /api/user/plan-usage: Returns plan_name, limits (signals_per_day, chat_msgs_per_day, alerts, multi_timeframe, trade_execution), usage (signals_today, chat_msgs_today, active_alerts)

plan_limits.free: 3 signals/day, 10 chat msgs/day, no multi-TF, no trade execution
plan_limits.basic: 5 signals/day, 50 chat msgs/day, no multi-TF, no trade execution
plan_limits.pro: 25 signals/day, 100 chat msgs/day, multi-TF enabled, no trade execution
plan_limits.titan: Unlimited signals, unlimited chat, multi-TF, trade execution enabled

oanda_trade_execution.GET /api/trade/account: Returns balance, unrealized_pnl, nav, margin_used, margin_available, open_trade_count, currency
oanda_trade_execution.GET /api/trade/positions: Returns positions array with instrument, direction, units, unrealized_pnl, avg_price
oanda_trade_execution.GET /api/trade/history: Returns trades array with trade_id, instrument, units, order_type, status, created_at
oanda_trade_execution.POST /api/trade/order: Requires Titan plan, places order via OANDA API
oanda_trade_execution.POST /api/trade/close/{instrument}: Requires Titan plan, closes position via OANDA API

community_and_leaderboard.GET /api/community/stats: Returns total_traders (28), total_signals_generated (62), total_trades_logged (0), community_win_rate (0%), active_today
community_and_leaderboard.GET /api/community/leaderboard: Returns leaderboard array (empty - requires 3+ closed trades with P&L)
community_and_leaderboard.GET /api/community/my-stats: Returns total_trades, closed_trades, wins, losses, win_rate, total_pnl, total_signals, badges, leaderboard_rank
community_and_leaderboard.tier_system: bronze, silver, gold, platinum, diamond based on total_pnl
community_and_leaderboard.badges: First Trade, Active Trader, Veteran Trader, Winning Streak, 1K Club, 10K Club, Signal Hunter, Sharpshooter

seo.GET /api/sitemap.xml: Returns valid XML sitemap with all pages (/, /auth, /dashboard, /signals, /markets, /portfolio, /chat, /journal, /pricing, /settings, /strategy, /alerts)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 verified all new features: 1) Plan-based feature gating works - /api/user/plan returns limits and features, /api/user/plan-usage returns usage stats. 2) OANDA trade execution works - account shows $100K balance, positions and history endpoints work, order placement requires Titan plan. 3) Community & Leaderboard works - stats show 28 traders, 62 signals, leaderboard is empty (needs 3+ closed trades), my-stats returns badges and rank. 4) SEO sitemap returns valid XML. 5) Frontend: Trade page (/trade) and Leaderboard page (/leaderboard) render correctly with all components. 6) Signals page shows plan usage badge (Titan Plan - Unlimited signals today). All APIs are LIVE (no mocking).
